title: sorghum schottii
intro: Sorghum schottii, also known as broom sorghum, is a perennial plant species in the sorghum genus, native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sorghum schottii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Sorghum schottii include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or other solvents.
